plugins.name: obsidian-weaver
plugins.description: Claude Code as the interface to your Obsidian vault. Daily notes, captures, and an auto-maintained knowledge graph that weaves connections between your notes as you write them. Vault-agnostic — set OBSIDIAN_VAULT and run /obsidian-setup.
